summary: Excellent sound captures a blistering Dear Mr. Fantasy performance, making this intense show a must‑listen.
review: The recording delivers crystal‑clear audio that even beats other well‑known sources, while the band erupts on an unforgettable Dear Mr. Fantasy/Other One sequence. Reviewers describe the set as intense and highlight the impassioned, blistering delivery of Fantasy as the show’s centerpiece.

ai_rating.rationale: Consistently high reviewer ratings (5‑star and 4‑star) emphasize a standout performance and excellent sound quality, yielding a strong combined score.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Great, crisp sound that reviewers say beats other popular sources (Senn441, D5Scott); no reported drop‑outs or muddiness.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Overall intense and engaging performance with a high point in the Fantasy/Other One sequence; reviewers felt the show rose from average to exceptional because of that moment.
